actionUnits.condition: BestTime MonoBehaviour_0 (id=1936206876, guid=2664046b114218c42bfef99a90e8522c) has no UnityEvent m_Calls and no public no-arg methods. Start() auto-executes on scene load and calls TimeDisplay(bestTime) only if active scene name == 'Hub'. To fully cover behavior, bestTimeText must be assigned and checkTime(float) must be invoked by another system; provide references or a no-arg wrapper to invoke.

actionUnits.condition: BodyCollider MonoBehaviour_0 (id=822151145, guid=349b1e6dd63d78147bcda3eab8cc058e) matches the provided script. Serialized refs: MainCamera={fileID:1241724591}, feet={fileID:1054322465}. CapsuleCollider (id=822151146) is enabled, allowing Trigger eligibility; however, BodyCollider exposes no public no-arg methods (only Start/Update). Its behavior (position follow) runs automatically in Update. To validate coverage we need to move MainCamera and/or feet during runtime; please provide those child objects’ scene meta (and whether they have Rigidbody/Collider/EventTrigger) so we can legally apply Transform/Trigger per rules.
